Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: We built a stock-looking pump-gas 534 BBC sleeper with big torque and power, swap-ready and dyno-tested.
Video.title: Sleeper 534 Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie refresh their 632 BBC for a street rod. New cam, EFI, and more!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 1

Video.summary: 632 BBC dyno time! Forged short block, heads, cam, EFI. Max HP tuning!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 2

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.
Video.title: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Image.alt: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Video.summary: '89 Chevy Silverado sport truck: shakedown run, dyno test, then stripped to the frame for transformation.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 1 Bare Bones

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS frame mods: boxing plates, fuel tank mockup, clutch install, drivetrain drop.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 3 Building Blocks

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Video.summary: This 1970 Mustang will take a 50 year leap into the future, and we're building it to give away!
Video.title: EBC Mustang Sweepstakes Project

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team dives into building a solid foundation for this Resto Mod.
Video.title: Mustang Backside Alterations

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang has to hook and stick to the ground.
Video.title: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Image.alt: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang is transformed.
Video.title: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Image.alt: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew creates a custom exhaust with some TIG Tech.
Video.title: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Image.alt: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team goes all in to reveal their supercharged pony.
Video.title: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Image.alt: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel roll an Hurst Olds into the shop and begin adding thunder back into this classic.
Video.title: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Image.alt: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Video.summary: We restore a '83 Hurst Olds retro rocket’s finish to a showroom shine.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 02

Video.summary: Grease and gears begin to fly as we swap out our 307 engine for one built in shop of Joe Mondello.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 03

Video.summary: We wire up and cool off our Mondello big-block to take the Hurst's performance from worst to first.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 04

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew rescues a familiar green 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Driveway Rescue - 1971 Chevy Caprice

Video.summary: We kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, by searching through a big-body boneyard.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 1

Video.summary: We mock, swap, and drop in a new transmission to handle all the power we’re adding to our Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 2

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel visit the powder room to freshen up the frame on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 3

Video.summary: We make repairs on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, showing you how to remove rust and pull dents.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 4

Video.summary: A fresh coat of paint helps transform our Chevy Caprice into a not-so-lean, mean, green machine!
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 5

Video.summary: A marriage made in heaven – Our Fat Stack Caprice gets reunited with our updated chassis.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 6

Video.summary: Chrome is where the heart is – Tommy and Joel update the bright work on their ‘71 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 7

Video.summary: We begin to piece our ‘71 Caprice Fat Stack back together, installing glass, hood, and body panels.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 8

Video.summary: We install the cooling system on our ’71 Caprice and then put the pedal to the metal.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 9

Video.summary: We restore the heater box on Fat Stack, and install air conditioning components to make it cool.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Image.alt: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Video.summary: The guys finalize Fat Stack’s transformation from automatic to manual.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 11

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel cut a rug and freshen up Fat Stack’s interior to match the flashy exterior.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 12

Video.summary: The finish line is in sight for Fat Stack with finishing touches and a one-of-a-kind grille.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 13

Video.summary: Our 1971 Chevy Caprice, Project Fat Stack, ROARS to life after almost a year of work.
Video.title: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Image.alt: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Video.summary: Ford’s high-revving modern engine gets some racy parts, then it is put to the test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Coyote Power

Video.summary: Our GM long block gets a big blower and a versatile EFI setup.
Video.title: Supercharged Stroker LS3
